name: VWAP Reversion — Mean Reversion Engine
origin: Extracted from Lucid v6.3 (Algo 2 — reversion module)
notes: Produces very few signals (~6 total across 3 assets over 2 years). Compound condition stack is too restrictive. Needs threshold tuning or architectural rework.
todo: Relax rejection candle threshold (0.4 -> 0.3?) — biggest signal killer
Test without MTF filter — may over-constrain ranging conditions
Consider removing vwap_flat requirement — VWAP slope may be irrelevant for extension trades
Test on 3m timeframe — more bars may produce more signal overlap
Compare against simple Bollinger Band mean reversion as baseline
Evaluate whether regime gate (ADX < 25) is needed when other conditions already filter
